title: onobrychis galegifolia
intro: Onobrychis galegifolia, also known as Persian clover or red clover, is a perennial legume native to Europe and Asia. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating menopausal symptoms, osteoporosis, and cardiovascular diseases due to its estrogenic and flavonoid content. The health benefits of Onobrychis galegifolia include reducing inflammation, improving bone density, and supporting cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in teas, capsules, or tinctures to promote overall well-being.
